Trigger a registered GitHub Actions pipeline

Source: R/dal.R
eri_trigger.Rd

Dispatches a workflow_dispatch event to a registered GitHub Actions pipeline from R. Authenticates with a GitHub Personal Access Token stored in the GITHUB_PAT environment variable (needs workflow scope).

Registered pipelines

NameRepositoryWorkflow
hsp-malthecartercenter/health-hsp-malariadata_ingestion.yml

Usage

eri_trigger(
  pipeline,
  country,
  disease,
  year = NULL,
  phase = "prod",
  ref = "main"
)

Arguments

pipeline

str Registered pipeline name. Currently "hsp-mal".

country

str Country code passed as a workflow input (e.g. "dr").

disease

str Disease name passed as a workflow input (e.g. "malaria").

year

int or NULL Optional year passed as a workflow input. Default NULL.

phase

str Pipeline phase. Default "prod"; use "testing" for dry runs.

ref

str Branch or tag to run the workflow against. Default "main".

Value

Invisibly, the URL to the workflow's runs page on GitHub.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
eri_trigger("hsp-mal", "dr", "malaria", phase = "testing")
} # }
